top_signals.title: Oil Set for Weekly Gain as Middle East Crisis Fuels Supply Fears - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Oil Set for Weekly Gain as Middle East Crisis Fuels Supply Fears  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Chinese Banks Break With Lending Benchmark in Pricing New Credit
top_signals.summary: Three of the biggest Chinese banks experimented with anchoring new loans to interbank rates, a step toward a new pricing mechanism that could better reflect supply and demand for money in the market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Khazanah Is Said to Sell $340 Million Tenaga Stake in Placement
top_signals.summary: Malaysian sovereign wealth fund Khazanah Nasional Bhd. has sold 1.39 billion ringgit ($340 million) worth of shares in state-owned power firm Tenaga Nasional Bhd., according to people with knowledge of the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Strategy, BlackRock form Bitcoin Security Consortium to prepare for quantum computing threat
top_signals.summary: Nine firms including Strategy and BlackRock formed a $15 million Bitcoin security consortium to fund post-quantum cryptography research.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Japan to boost immigration workforce in crackdown on visa overstayers
Proof of Reserves: What It Means for Exchange Trust
top_signals.summary: The Trust Deficit For most of the crypto industry’s history, users who deposited assets with an exchange simply trusted that the funds were there. FTX ended that complacency when it collapsed in 2022, with investigators finding that billions in customer deposits had been quietly diverted to its affiliated trading firm, leaving a shortfall of roughly […]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: LG to Ban Residential Proxies from Smart TV Apps
top_signals.summary: The home appliance giant LG Electronics USA said this week it plans to suspend any apps built for its smart TVs that turn one's television into an always-on residential proxy node. The move comes less than a month after researchers found that more than 42 percent of games and other apps available for download on LG's webOS store allow unknown third-parties to route their Internet traffic through a user's TV.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
